qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Execute Command node allows unrestricted shell command execution without sanitization
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets the built-in Execute Command node calling child_process.exec(), not crafted expression evaluation in workflow parameters or an expression escape.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Multipart form-data parser lacks field count and size limits enabling denial of service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets Formidable multipart parsing limits on webhook endpoints, not n8n expression evaluation or command execution from crafted expressions.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: OAuth callback endpoints skip authentication by default enabling credential hijacking
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets skipped authentication on OAuth callback endpoints, not crafted workflow parameter expression evaluation or an expression sandbox escape.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described n8n expression evaluation escape that lets an authenticated workflow editor execute host commands through crafted workflow parameter expressions.
evidence: The advisory summary and details describe expression evaluation escape RCE in workflow parameters by authenticated users with workflow creation or modification permission.

execute-command-rce identifies the Execute Command node's direct child_process.exec() behavior in packages/nodes-base/nodes/ExecuteCommand/ExecuteCommand.node.ts, which is a different root cause and code path.
multipart-upload-dos identifies missing Formidable multipart limits in packages/cli/src/webhooks/webhook-form-data.ts, a denial-of-service parser issue unrelated to expression evaluation.
oauth-callback-bypass identifies skipped authentication on OAuth callback controllers, an authorization issue unrelated to expression evaluation.

The advisory's referenced commits modify packages/nodes-base/nodes/Git/GenericFunctions.ts and Git.node.ts to sanitize Git remote URLs; none of the final qualifying findings identify that code path either.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding was present, so no PoC was eligible to run for Tier1 or Tier2 evaluation.
